message:
feat: Integrate safe_fetch with h2 client and URL security policy

- Wire h2 client into safe_fetch's doFetchH2() method
  - Conditional import based on h2_available flag
  - Supports GET/POST with HTTP/2 multiplexing + TLS 1.3

- Add safe_fetch to edgebox_wamr.zig for host imports
  - Import safe_fetch module
  - Add g_security_policy global for URL filtering
  - Add URL allowlist check in httpRequest() (returns -403 if blocked)

- Update .edgebox.json schema for HTTP security config
  - allowedUrls: URL patterns allowed for fetch (glob support)
  - blockedUrls: URL patterns blocked (takes precedence)
  - rateLimitRps: Max requests per second
  - maxConnections: Max concurrent HTTP connections
